feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Getting Message no. F2803 error while using "FI_WT_VENDOR_UPDATE" functional module in SE37
entry.content: This is error I am getting while uploading standard bapi program "FI_WT_VENDOR_UPDATE" in SE37 TCode, System error in table LFBW Message no. F2803.

entry.title: Message no. F2803
entry.content: Getting this error while updating vendor withholding tax details in "FI_WT_VENDOR_UPDATE" BAPI in SE37.

entry.title: A Question regarding Editable ALV Report.
entry.content:
I have created a CDS view from a Z table. Then I am trying to consume the CDS view in an ALV report where I want "MENGE" field(Purchase order quantity) to be editable. That is I am trying to create an editable ALV report. But I am receiving some error, Hence I am unable to do so. Please help me to find the solution.  Following is the program : 

DATA: gt_data TYPE TABLE OF ZCDS_PO_02,
      gr_alv  TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table,
      gr_table TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table,
       gr_columns TYPE REF TO cl_salv_columns_table,
      gr_column TYPE REF TO cl_salv_column.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  SELECT * FROM ZCDS_PO_02 INTO TABLE gt_data.

  TRY.
      cl_salv_table=>factory(
        IMPORTING
          r_salv_table = gr_alv
        CHANGING
          t_table      = gt_data
      ).

" Get column settings for MENGE field
      gr_column = gr_alv->get_columns( )->get_column( 'MENGE' ).

      IF gr_column IS BOUND.
        " Set MENGE field editable
        gr_column->set_cell_editable( abap_true ).
      ELSE.
        MESSAGE 'Column MENGE not found' TYPE 'E'.
      ENDIF.

    CATCH cx_salv_msg INTO DATA(lx_salv_msg).
      MESSAGE lx_salv_msg TYPE 'E'.
  ENDTRY.

Error :

Please help me to remove the error and you may also share alternative approach if any.

entry.title: condition type to be displayed in the sales order and invoice but not in the credit memo, debits
entry.content: There is a Requirement that a specific condition value for the condition type to be shown/ calculated in the sales order and invoice but not in the credit memo, debit memo and returns

entry.title: Production Order Rescheduling - Already REL, PCNF & PDLV.
entry.content: Please explain the Scenario pf Production Order Rescheduling - Already REL, PCNF & PDLV.

entry.title: can we run depreciation on particular date in the month
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Actually client want to run depreciation on every month 28, so what should i do basic configuration.

Please let me know.

Best Regards,

G vijayakumar.

entry.title: Deletion indicator in Service Entry sheet not updated after Revoke Deletion of SES
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

My user cannot delete a Service PO due to floating amount in PO history resulting to cannot delete or block the PO. 

1. SES was already deleted but Del Indicator is not ticked.

2. PO history still showing amount but Limits tab Actual value already zero 

Thanks in Advance

Carlo

entry.title: Button "Create Service" in Soamanager is disabled in Production Environment
entry.content:
Hi All,

   I need your help, the button "Create Service" in Soamanager is inactive in Production environment we already activate in SICF tcode the Node “/sap/bc/srt” and all the sub-nodes, but when I go into Soamanager and try to create the service the "Create Service" button is disabled (In Quality environment and Development environment the button is active and I already create the service).

   Is there another thing to activate in SICF in Production environment? Or is there something else to configure or activate?

 

Regards.

entry.title: Event-Based Revenue Recognition - DropShipment
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

In SAP Help, for Public Cloud, EBRR for Sales Orders is supported for the DropShipment scenario. 

However it is not clear to me what is the trigger for revenue recognition in this case. MIRO for the Vendor Invoice (as in RAR)? Customer is asking if possible that the GR to be the trigger. Is it the case?

Thank you,

Christine

entry.title: post flooding maximum 6 messages per hour?
entry.content:
Hello,

I just obtained this weird error message after posting few comments today (for the same reason, I also had to wait for posting this question :-p).

Correct the highlighted errors and try again.

  • Post flooding detected (user tried to post more than 6 messages within 3,600 seconds)

Is it really expected to have this very low limit of 6 messages per hour?

If a user is looking at all the questions once a day, this limit may be quickly reached.

Is it possible to remove this limit for experienced posters? (I know my own user has privileges like accepting a solution for someone else question, so it would be easy to permit all these privileged users to post more than 6 messages).

Thank you.

Sandra

EDIT: also, there's a maximum of 2 messages per minute:

  • Post flooding detected (user tried to post more than 2 messages within 60 seconds)

entry.title: Purchasing Info Record and Conditions joining condition in CDS on S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content:
In S/4 Hana Cloud, I have created a purchasing info record document and created 2 conditions with different prices. Now I want to create a list report based on that. However, I cannot find the joining condition between these two. 

I have used I_PURCHASINGINFORECORDAPI01 and I_PURGPRCGCONDITIONRECORD for creating the report but didn't find a suitable condition for joining. 

Can anyone assist me in getting the joining condition?

entry.title: API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL How to create BOM with BOM Item Object Dependency Assignment via Odata?
entry.content:
I am able to create BOM with Header and Item, then add the BOM Item Object Dependency Assignment into Created BOM. However, I want to create BOM with BOM Item Object Dependency Assignment via Odata in only 1 Call. Is it possible?

I am using this API below and I see the to_BOMItmObjDependencyAssignment  inside the to_BillOfMaterialItem but can't create Object Dependency in the same time even though it returns 201 and the BOM Header - Item is created, not Object Dependency.
SAP Business Accelerator Hub

This is the request body for POST menthod

 

{
    "BillOfMaterial": "",
    "BillOfMaterialCategory": "M",
    "BillOfMaterialVariant": "1",
    "BillOfMaterialVersion": "",
    "EngineeringChangeDocument": "",
    "Material": "999",
    "Plant": "1234",
    "BillOfMaterialVariantUsage": "3",
    "BillOfMaterialAuthsnGrp": "7000",
    "IsConfiguredMaterial": true,
    "BOMHeaderText": "API Test Create",
    "BillOfMaterialStatus": "10",
    "to_BillOfMaterialItem": [
        {
            "BillOfMaterial": "",
            "BillOfMaterialCategory": "T",
            "BillOfMaterialVariant": "1",
            "BillOfMaterialVersion": "",
            "BillOfMaterialItemNodeNumber": "1",
            "HeaderChangeDocument": "",
            "Material": "999",
            "Plant": "1234",
            "BillOfMaterialComponent": "",
            "BillOfMaterialItemCategory": "T",
            "BillOfMaterialItemNumber": "0010",
            "BillOfMaterialItemUnit": "PC",
            "BillOfMaterialItemQuantity": "10",
            "BOMItemDescription": "TESTING BOM CREATE 999",
            "DependencyObjectNumber": "0",
            "ObjectType": "2",
            "to_BOMItmObjDependencyAssignment": [
                {
                    "BillOfMaterial": "",
                    "BillOfMaterialCategory": "M",
                    "BillOfMaterialVariant": "1",
                    "BillOfMaterialVersion": "",
                    "BillOfMaterialItemNodeNumber": "1",
                    "HeaderChangeDocument": "",
                    "Material": "999",
                    "Plant": "1234",
                    "ObjectDependencyName": "TEST_OBJ_DEPEN",
                    "ObjDpnProcessingSequenceValue": "0"
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}

entry.title: Over-Delivery Qty Tolerance with the customer credit management
entry.content:
Hi all, Hope you are all doing well

There is a case when the credit limit for the customer is 100K $ and he already consumed 90K $ of the credit limit, then the customer requested a sales order with 10K $ with the remaining credit limit and he can release his order successfully, but in the outbound delivery level, the material was having a tolerance 5% more, which means the order value increased with 500 $ more than the customer credit limit.

What I need is to know if there are any functionality in the standard or customized way can make the system to allow to exceed the customer credit limit with the over-delivery tolerance amount only?

I appreciated your usual support, suggestions, consultations

entry.title: Is there any way skip Sap login for MDK app?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m currently developing an application using the SAP Mobile Development Kit (MDK). The application is intended for customers who do not have SAP IDs. Therefore, the usual SAP login process is not applicable in this case.

I’m looking for a way to bypass or skip the SAP login for the MDK app entirely. This is not just for development or testing purposes, but also for the actual usage of the app by our customers who do not have SAP IDs.

Is there a setting, configuration, or perhaps a different authentication method that can be used to accommodate this requirement?

Any help or guidance on this matter would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: I want to create a custom promotion condition using the CustomerType Object which is an Enum Type
entry.content: I want to create a custom promotion condition using the CustomerType Object which is an Enum Type if the CustomerType.REGISTERED is equals to the provided value through B.O. then an existing action should be used. How to make the custom promotion condition ? Also I have created a mapper class to map the value of enum through B.O. but after saving it through exception "Value is not an instance of string" from class DefaultRuleParameterValueMapperStrategy.class how to fix this issue too ?

entry.title: SAC Forecast chart feature seems missing
entry.content:
Hello community.

I have a question about finding the forecast add-in in a time series chart. With the previous version of SAC stories I could locate it in the "3 dot" menu of the chart, in the "Add" section.

But in the new optimized version I wasn't able to find it anywhere. Did anyone from the community fased a similar issue? How can I solve it? 

Thank you in advance 

 

#SAP #SAC#Forecast

entry.title: Unable to join groups in SAP community
entry.content:
Hi,

My friend has been trying to join groups in SAP Community but he gets this error message

Is there any solution?

Regards,

Tri

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud - Configuring Forms in Content Studio with dependencies
entry.content:
Hello SAP community

If we are using a form in SAP Content Studio, we don't see any possibility to hide the following (input)field in a form, depending on the chosen value of the previous one.

Example: IF Country is chosen USA, than show field Region, otherwise hide it.

Is this per design or are we missing something important here? We thought we may can work around it while enhancing with css, but also did not succeed.

The only work-around we see at the moment is to work with restricted values on the following field (what would work as long as these two fields have a data dependency).

Many thanks for a good hint!

Best regards, Stefan

entry.title: OM Hierarchy
entry.content:
I was assigned the task of creating a hierarchy where the Finance Manager is at the top, supervising the Assistant Finance Manager, and subsequently, the Finance Manager is the line supervisor of the Finance Officer. I have created the positions and defined the relationships accordingly, but the Finance Officer is not appearing in the reporting structure.

Spoiler

entry.title: Insert data using table control ( ABAP )
entry.content:
Guys I desperately need your help.  I have a table control ( Using wizard) to input data to a custom table and some functions similar to vba1. 

The thing is I execute the module pool enter data but It wont work 

I have to click on the insert row button 

But I want to be able to enter data directly. I want it to be like similar to table control in vba1. it is for scrap sale. I am new to abap. so help guys. 

ABAP Development SAP Community
